calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Jacqueline Chan.
Petitioner: Yu Qing Huang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Zhen Hua Zhao, and with Cantonese Interpreter: William Guan.
Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Xiu Jin Zhao, not present, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the Minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and direct examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Michael Zhen Hua Zhao.
Decree signed in open court.
